title: Die andere Seite
writer: Hella Moja, Hans Reisiger, R.C. Sherriff
actors: Conrad Veidt, Theodor Loos, Friedrich Ettel
plot: In WW1, Captain Stanhope is the commander of a British company fighting against the Germans. The young Lieutenant Raleigh admires the older man who he knows from the prewar days. While Stanhope tries to keep up the image of an exe...
